note: Readiness-authored acceptance bar + independent-reproduction record. The board imports these. A row reaches 'verified' ONLY after claude-yentl personally re-derives the proof. 'accepted' is Owner-only.

P0-004.acceptance_criteria: A redirect/DNS-rebind to a private IP is blocked at fetch time (not just pre-check) in media-ingest + article-ingest; transcribe-batch {url} branch calls assertSafeUrl; legitimate public fetches still succeed; tests cover the rebind/redirect case.
P0-004.readiness_verdict: VERIFIED (2026-06-20; Codex fix, my reproduction). Was BLOCKED on 22 media-mime test regressions; Codex rewrote tests/media-mime.test.ts to mock fetchWithSsrfGuard (the new SSRF path) and ADDED genuine SSRF-block coverage. I re-ran the FULL suite in the codex worktree: 179 files / 1865 tests pass, 0 failed (was 22). Read the new test: line 242 'propagates SSRF_BLOCKED for a private literal IP target' (127.0.0.1) + rebind case -- security win COVERED, not weakened/gamed. ssrf-guard impl sound (IP-pinned + redirect re-validation). P0-004 done at code level.

P0-005.acceptance_criteria: Security events persist to a real sink (not a no-op); a simulated model-slug error does NOT silently 503-refuse every claim invisibly — the failure is observable/alerting, and the gate fail-mode is a deliberate, documented choice.
proof_required: model-error path emits an observable signal

P1-001.acceptance_criteria: All 5 hardening headers present on every response (HSTS 63072000+includeSubDomains+preload, nosniff, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy disabling camera/geo/payment but PRESERVING microphone, CSP-Report-Only default-src 'self' + Deepgram/Gateway allowlist); tsc+lint+test green; verified via live curl.

tests/security-headers.test.ts 8/8
tsc exit 0
lint exit 0

P1-003.acceptance_criteria: Diarization is ON only behind an explicit, granular consent that the user actively grants; a voiceprint-deletion path exists and works; a recorded legal sign-off (DPIA/TIA update) authorizes biometric processing; default remains OFF. (Owner-gated — autonomy rule 11.)
P1-003.reproduction_plan: I verify diarize stays false without consent and only flips with it; I confirm the deletion path and the recorded sign-off.

P1-004.acceptance_criteria: Real multi-speaker accuracy is measured on the ACTUAL shipping pipeline (post-P1-003), on at least one real 30-45min multi-speaker debate with human-labeled ground truth; WER + speaker-attribution numbers recorded with the config they were measured under; no public 'robust multi-speaker' claim exceeds the measured evidence.
P1-004.reproduction_plan: I re-score at least one sample myself and confirm the public copy matches the measured number.
